title: notholaena scariosa
intro: Notholaena scariosa, also known as the rough-lobed cloak fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Notholaena scariosa include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea or tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
